title: Justicia eylesii
intro: Justicia eylesii, also known as Eyles' Justicia, is a tropical plant species in the family Acanthaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its potential to alleviate fever, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of Justicia eylesii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal activities. In traditional herbal medicine, Justicia eylesii is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues, including respiratory infections, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal disorders.
